meta.heroTitleZh: 杀戮尖塔 2 最强流派与核心卡牌
meta.heroTitleEn: Slay the Spire 2 Top Builds & Core Cards
meta.heroDescriptionZh: 职业筛选、语言切换和卡牌详情都在前端即时响应，适合跑图时作为副屏快速查表。
meta.heroDescriptionEn: Class filtering, locale switching, and card inspection all respond instantly on the client.

entries.titleZh: 铁甲战士 消耗引擎
entries.noteZh: 启动快、资源滚动强，成型后能在长短战都维持压制。
entries.noteEn: Fast setup and elite scaling, with pressure in both short and long fights.

entries.titleZh: 静默猎手 小刀节奏
entries.noteZh: 低费爆发与多段触发兼备，清图和首领都很稳定。
entries.noteEn: Efficient burst and multi-hit scaling, strong in hallway and boss fights.

entries.titleZh: 缺陷行者 集中充能球
entries.noteZh: 中后期成长最顺滑，防御与输出都能自然叠高。
entries.noteEn: One of the smoothest late-game scalers with both defense and damage.

entries.titleZh: 死灵术士 召唤爆发
entries.noteZh: 上限极高，成型后能快速改写战斗节奏。
entries.noteEn: Explosive ceiling that can take over fights once assembled.

entries.titleZh: 铁甲战士 力量旋风
entries.noteZh: 更依赖牌序，但只要力量堆起来，收尾速度很快。
entries.noteEn: Slightly draw-order dependent, but kills quickly once strength stacks.

entries.titleZh: 静默猎手 毒控拖杀
entries.noteZh: Boss 战表现极好，但前期清杂需要补足节奏。
entries.noteEn: Excellent boss damage, but needs help in early hallway tempo.

entries.titleZh: 缺陷行者 零费循环
entries.noteZh: 一旦组件齐全会非常流畅，但过渡期不如 S 档稳定。
entries.noteEn: Very smooth with all pieces online, but less stable during setup.

entries.noteZh: 后期上限高，适合对局规划清晰的路线。
entries.noteEn: High ceiling for well-routed runs with enough setup time.

entries.titleZh: 铁甲战士 格挡拍击
entries.noteZh: 生存优秀，但伤害节奏更吃特定组合。
entries.noteEn: Defensively strong, but damage pacing depends on exact payoffs.

entries.titleZh: 静默猎手 弃牌价值
entries.noteZh: 灵活度高，但爆发上限通常逊于刀流和毒流。
entries.noteEn: Flexible and safe, but usually lower ceiling than shiv or poison lines.

entries.titleZh: 死灵术士 消耗拖场
entries.noteZh: 容错不错，但结束战斗的速度偏慢。
entries.noteEn: Reasonable margin for error, but often too slow to close fights fast.

entries.titleZh: 缺陷行者 能力叠层
entries.noteZh: 上限不低，但启动期容易被高压战惩罚。
entries.noteEn: Solid ceiling, though the early setup window is punishable.

entries.titleZh: 铁甲战士 朴素快攻
entries.noteZh: 前期能用，但缺乏后期稳定成长和爆发转化。
entries.noteEn: Serviceable early, but lacks reliable late-game scaling.

entries.titleZh: 静默猎手 零散蹭伤
entries.noteZh: 能过前几层，但整体强度和成型上限都偏低。
entries.noteEn: Can handle early floors, but overall ceiling is limited.

entries.titleZh: 缺陷行者 随机充能球
entries.noteZh: 随机性过高，强度容易随牌序和敌人类型波动。
entries.noteEn: Too volatile, with output swinging on draw order and enemy mix.

entries.titleZh: 摄政者 慢速大法术
entries.noteZh: 单卡质量不错，但需要太多回合与前置支撑。
entries.noteEn: Individual cards are fine, but the setup tax is often too high.
